title: Copying / duplicating data inter-region servers
excerpt:
Hello :wave: 
Have tried reviewing documentation but unable to find an answer to this - we are consolidating accounts on different data region servers, is there an option that will allow us to copy data from a US region …

posts.author: veneciab (Venecia B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

Have tried reviewing documentation but unable to find an answer to this - we are consolidating accounts on different data region servers, is there an option that will allow us to copy data from a US region server to an EU region server?

Thanks in advance

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
@veneciab

Unfortunately, copying data directly from a US region server to an EU region server in monday.com is not currently possible. This is due to data residency regulations and monday.com’s architecture.
